title: Keeg's Weapon Mod
description: Adds vanilla style weapons and enchantments!
body:
## Weapons
Adds 4 vanilla syle weapons to the game, the scythe, the dagger, the katana, and the greatsword. 


![Weapons Added](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3e7a20f999abd9f8d038cd7e302ade2c530689ac.png)

The scythe is a mix between a sword and an axe, the dagger deals less damage than a sword with a shorter cooldown, the katana does the same damage as a sword, but with a quicker cooldown as long as your offhand is empty, and the greatsword deals similar damage to an axe with a shorter cooldown, as long as your offhand is empty.

Katana and greatsword have custom two-handed player models.
![Two-handed Player Model](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ed59a4251dda191ad69047c3545f0955fe22fe00.png)

## Enchantments
Adds 7 new enchantments, 4 only being able to be applied to their respective custom weapons.

<details>
<summary>Respective Weapon For Each Enchantment</summary>
  
- Thundering: Greatswords
- Dash: Katanas
- Leech: Scythes
- Poison Tipped: Dagger
- Pathfinder: Boots
- Expert: All tools and weapons
- Illager Bane: All weapons

</details>

![Custom Enchantments](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4ef228e6f8e1caec7a05b12fa6210f070d0f18e3.png)

## Legendary Weapons
Adds 3 legendary weapons with custom abilities, the Reapers Scythe, Grand Assassins Dagger, and Shoguns Katana. (Regular crafting recipies are only in 1.20 versions)

<details>
<summary>Weapon Abilities and Custom Visuals</summary>

Reapers Scythe: Stores souls (max 10) and is able to release them on right-click in a sonic boom like attack, the amount of souls effects the damage it deals. Has custom sweep particles, kill particles, and animated model. Can only have leech enchant applied to it.

Grand Assassins Dagger: On right-click gives a speed boost and gives user the saturation effect. Deals extra damage to an entities back. Has custom ability particles, backstab particles, and animated model. Can only have fire aspect enchant applied to it.

Shoguns Katana: Has a double dash ability, allowing you to dash up to two times on right-click, with a cooldown bar under the weapon. Has a 30% chance to block incoming arrows when holding it. Has custom sweep particles. Can only have knockback enchant applied to it.

*All legendary weapons don't have duribility

</details>

![Legendary Weapons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/688c40b63263a51cd56ad52760bc38dd14710204.png)

## Weapon Forge
4 Weapons Forges, one for each weapon type. Must be powered to use them to craft in a new 7x7 crafting grid. After crafting something recipe is locked server wide (Can be undone with commands). They can be found in one of 4 rare structures, one for each weapon type.

Recipes: 

![Grand Assassins Dagger Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ad7eefec9ec508a51e5a15a42e901288104034fb.png)
![Reapers Scythe Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/541af8b1917df26e9752fdc1e9c905317fedce37.png)
![Shoguns Katana Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9006d0a66c329f6c4b820459beb5205c97c1469f.png)
